_comment: Claude Code hooks — Silent on Q&A, Feedback on results (C1/C2/Threads/2-week-purge).

hooks.prompt: If `.memory/state.md` missing → create locally (State, Tunnels, Wings, Archive). If exists → read Active Wings, Sessions, and Threads silently. Do NOT summarize unless first-time init. Proceed silently.

Skip prerequisite check if path contains: .kiro/, .claude/, .memory/, planning/, audit.md, or PROGRESS.md. Otherwise, enforce sequence: domain-decomposition → user-stories; design → decomposition; implementation → design; tests → implementation. Return {"ok": true} silently.

If file written is test (*.spec.ts/*.robot) → run test. If PASS: report '✅ [file] passes' and trigger Memory Palace update later. If FAIL: attempt self-healing max 3 times. If NOT test: return {"ok": true} SILENTLY.

Evaluate .memory/ save. First, locate workspace root by finding the folder containing .claude/ or .kiro/. SKIP: Q&A, comparison, git, read. SAVE if ANY: C1=user made a choice/decision from options presented, C2=test passed or feature verified working, file written, gotcha found, or open thread identified. If SAVE: Update {root}/.memory/ (state.md, wings/, tunnels.md) per SKILL.md. For Open Threads: 1. Add @YYYY-MM-DD to newly finished [x] tasks. 2. Purge [x] tasks older than 14 days. After save: check if any wing has >10 rooms OR Recent Sessions >10 rows — if exceeded, remind user to archive that wing. Inform: '✓ Memory Palace updated'. Else SILENT.
